name: Hoisin Pork Medallions
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat from the pork tenderloin.
2. Cut the tenderloin crosswise into 8 slices.
3. Place between 2 sheets of heavy-duty plastic wrap, and flatten to 1/2 inch thickness.
4. Coat a large nonstick skillet with cooking spray; add sesame oil, and place over medium-high heat until hot.
5. Add garlic and red pepper; sauté 1 minute.
6. Add pork and cook 4 minutes on each side or until done. Remove pork from the skillet; set aside and keep warm.
7. Wipe drippings from the skillet with a paper towel.
8. Add water, sherry, and hoisin sauce to the skillet; stir well.
9. Cook 1 minute or until thickened, stirring constantly.
10. Spoon over pork; top with cilantro.
11. Serve with rice.
Note: Cut meat into largish matchsticks after flattening. Add the sauce without removing the meat.
